products.title: Our Fears Made Manifest
products.description: A collection examining terror, trauma, and loss in film from 1998 to 2019.
products.longDescription: An academic title rooted in horror, film, and popular culture studies, reflecting Ashley's ongoing engagement with criticism and scholarship.

products.title: Uncovering Stranger Things
products.description: Critical work engaging with nostalgia, innocence, and horror in the Stranger Things universe.
products.longDescription: A scholarly publication that reflects Ashley's interest in horror, popular culture, and how cultural stories shape identity and memory.

products.title: Theories and Strategies for Teaching Creative Writing Online
products.description: A pedagogy-focused resource for teaching creative writing in digital learning environments.
products.longDescription: A teaching-centered publication that reflects Ashley's classroom experience and commitment to creative writing instruction across formats.

products.title: Poop-tastic Coloring Adventures
products.description: A playful coloring title that brings a lighter, more whimsical energy into Ashley's creative work.
products.longDescription: A creative, kid-facing project that expands Ashley's body of work beyond academic writing and into accessible, imaginative formats.

products.title: World of Whiskers
products.description: A creative title included among Ashley's featured works from the previous site.
products.longDescription: A lighter creative project that sits alongside Ashley's academic and instructional work, showing a broader range of interests and formats.

products.title: The Crazy English Lady
products.description: Ashley's Teachers Pay Teachers storefront featuring classroom-ready resources and writing support materials.
products.longDescription: A growing teaching-resource collection designed to support writing instruction, classroom engagement, and creative learning.
